Job description

Position Overview

Protagolabs is seeking an experienced Machine Learning Engineer Intern with experience in NLP and computer vision to join our team. We are at the forefront of innovation, leveraging our own decentralized compute platform and distributed training techniques.

 

Responsibilities

Develop and deploy state-of-the-art machine learning models and algorithms for NLP and computer vision applications.
Implement and manage deep learning models using NVIDIA TensorRT for high-performance inference optimization.
Utilize NVIDIA Triton Inference Server to deploy, manage, and scale AI models in production environments.
Perform rigorous testing and validation of models to ensure stability and performance under various conditions.
Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI and deep learning technologies and methodologies.
Collaborate with data engineers to build scalable and efficient data pipelines for training and testing.
Design and build a robust data labeling pipeline to support various data labeling tasks, enhancing the training of machine learning models.
Design, develop, and deploy AI agent systems with autonomous reasoning, multi-step workflows, and tool/function execution.

 

 

Qualifications

Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in the STEM field (Computer Science, Engineering, Machine Learning, Operations Research, Mathematics, Statistics,etc.) 
Proven track record of developing and deploying successful machine learning models.
Strong background in machine learning, with expertise in NLP and computer vision and good understanding of the deep learning methods (CNN, Transformer, etc.) 
Strong knowledge of machine learning frameworks and libraries, including TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, and scikit-learn.
Self-motivated, collaborative, attention to details, and excellent time management.
Familiarity with data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model evaluation techniques.
Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS/Azure for deploying and managing machine learning models.

 

 

Preferred Qualifications

 

Experience with NVIDIA TensorRT and NVIDIA Triton Inference Server
Communication and collaboration: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
Proven ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams, explain complex concepts to non-technical stakeholders, and contribute to a positive team environment.
Experience building or working with AI agents or LLM-based autonomous workflows in production or research settings.

ProtagoLabs Inc. provides our clients with modeling, analytics, forecasting, and consulting services, based on data in economics, education, medical and public policy fields.
